response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior engineer with genuine geospatial experience (founder of GISCollective, Green Map GIS work) and proven low-latency systems work in DLang handling millions of requests per second, which demonstrates the systems mindset this role needs. However, his professional C++ experience is brief and dated (2014-2015), he has no Rust, and his recent years are dominated by TypeScript/Node full-stack product work. He has no direct routing or navigation guidance experience, so the core technology fit is weak despite adjacent strengths.
strengths: Hands-on geospatial data platform experience as founder of GISCollective and Green Map GIS applications
Low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems work (async I/O, caching, fibers) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship, and Linux proficiency
concerns: Modern C++ experience is limited and outdated (short stint in 2014-2015); no Rust experience
No routing, map-tiling, or navigation guidance system experience
Recent roles (4+ years) are TypeScript/Node web product work, far from systems-level pipeline engineering
